title: Vibrant Smoky Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A winey and snappy Brazilian dish featuring vanilla pod and wok-hei flavors, perfect for a crowd, this high protein friendly recipe is a must try for any occasion.
instructions: Cook the chicken to an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium high heat.
Thread the chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Meanwhile, combine the coconut milk, lime juice, and garlic in a small bowl.
Scrape the seeds from the vanilla pod and add them to the bowl, whisking to combine.
Brush the skewers with the vanilla coconut milk during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
